title: Time & Weather Changer
description: Change the client-side time and weather
body:
![Time & Weather Changer title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fa10394d5520248b85f7030c8abc9d520448cb2.png)

A Minecraft NeoForge & Fabric mod, that allows you to change client-side time and weather using a simple user interface.

![Screenshot of the in-game config with options for time and weather](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1662e543172422d8a57689b389f60b5d091dfbbe_0.webp)

### Features
- Weather and Time configurable through a GUI, which can be opened by pressing N (default keybinding)
- Works client-side
- Supports both NeoForge and Fabric
